title: senecio lugens
intro: Senecio lugens, also known as Ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio lugens include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
